payload.body:
Agent implementation completed and the managed branch was pushed.

I’ll inspect the app shell, shortcut registry, preference patterns, and existing UI tests first. I’ll then implement ⌘B (with the platform-appropriate Ctrl+B fallback if the shortcut system already follows that convention), update coverage, and run the focused verification suite.The shell components already contain the intended 280px/72px layout and accessible icon-only navigation treatment, but the desktop screen hardcodes `collapsed = false` and never wires the existing header toggle. The shortcut registry currently rejects every modified shortcut, so ⌘B needs a small, explicit modifier-aware extension rather than an ad hoc window listener. I’m checking the persistence boundary and test conventions before editing.I’ve confirmed ⌘B is not registered in the app-level shortcut registry. The markdown editor can still use its native bold behavior because app shortcuts are intentionally suppressed for editable targets; elsewhere, ⌘B will be handled globally and its default browser/Electron behavior prevented. I’m now wiring modifier-aware bindings, local preference persistence (matching the renderer’s existing route persistence pattern), and both workspace/settings sidebar layouts.Implementation is in place and formatted. Verification is currently blocked only by the prepared worktree having no `node_modules`; I’m installing the locked workspace dependencies, then I’ll run the desktop/UI tests, type checks, lint, and a final diff review.The focused UI suite passes (42 tests), and UI type checking is clean. Desktop surfaced one TypeScript narrowing issue in the new binding union, which I’m correcting now. The full desktop suite also hit a concurrent Electron binary extraction race from the fresh install; the 16 non-Electron suites passed, so I’ll repair that generated dependency and rerun once the code-level type issue is resolved.All implementation-specific desktop tests pass (14/14), both package type checks pass, the complete UI suite passes, and lint is clean. The desktop suite now reaches 77/78 tests; its only failure is an unrelated fixed-port integration test because port 4738 is already occupied by another process. The repository-wide formatter also reports hundreds of pre-existing files, so I’m validating only the touched files and reviewing the final diff for hook order, accessibility semantics, and unintended changes.The final verification set is clean: desktop/UI type checks, 14 focused interaction/accessibility tests, all 42 UI tests, lint, diff checks, and the production Electron build all pass. I’m doing one last status/diff audit and confirming the fixed-port test failure belongs to an already-running local process rather than this change.Implemented UKN-9GDKY.

### Completed

- Added persistent expanded/collapsed sidebar state using renderer local storage.
- Wired the existing 280px/72px shell layouts into the desktop workspace.
- Added a visible, keyboard-accessible header toggle with:
  - `aria-controls`
  - `aria-expanded`
  - `aria-keyshortcuts="Meta+B"`
  - Shortcut-aware tooltip text
- Added ⌘B support to the shortcut registry with exact modifier matching.
- Preserved editor bold behavior by suppressing the app shortcut inside editable fields.
- Added collapsed behavior to both workspace and settings navigation.
- Kept icon-only items accessible through screen-reader labels, stable focusable controls, and native tooltips.
- Added an interactive Storybook example and shortcut/persistence documentation.

Key files:

- [WorkspaceScreen.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf6xlxd_vzhx09vy3uni/packages/desktop/src/renderer/screens/WorkspaceScreen.tsx:173)
- [sidebarPreference.ts](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf6xlxd_vzhx09vy3uni/packages/desktop/src/renderer/screens/workspace/sidebarPreference.ts:1)
- [ShortcutProvider.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf6xlxd_vzhx09vy3uni/packages/desktop/src/renderer/shortcuts/ShortcutProvider.tsx:3)
- [SettingsSidebar.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf6xlxd_vzhx09vy3uni/packages/desktop/src/renderer/components/SettingsSidebar.tsx:1)
- [app-shell.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf6xlxd_vzhx09vy3uni/packages/ui/src/organisms/app-shell/app-shell.tsx:36)

### Verification

- Desktop focused tests: 14 passed
- UI tests: 42 passed
- Desktop and UI type checks: passed
- Production Electron build: passed
- Repository lint: passed
- Diff/whitespace validation: passed

The full desktop suite reached 77/78 passing. Its unrelated fixed-port API test could not bind port `4738` because the currently running Electron application already owns that port. No process was terminated.
